# @vllnt/next-llms

> AI discoverability for Next.js sites — generate llms.txt manifests and serve
> any page as raw markdown.

`@vllnt/next-llms` is a publishable, zero-dependency TypeScript package for
Next.js (App Router) and any Web-standard runtime. It exposes two functions.
`generateLlmsText(config)` returns an `llms.txt` index string in the llmstxt.org
shape — an `#` title, a `>` blockquote, optional free prose, `## Section` link
lists (`- [title](url): notes`), and a droppable `## Optional` section.
`createMarkdownRoute(resolver, options?)` returns a Web-standard
`(request) => Promise<Response>` route handler: it URL-decodes the pathname,
strips a trailing `.md`, calls the resolver with the slug, and returns `200`
`text/markdown` with a `Cache-Control` header when the resolver returns a string
(an empty string is content), or `404` `text/plain` when it returns `null`. The
handler imports nothing from `next`; `null` is the explicit not-found sentinel.

- [API Reference](docs/API.md): Function signatures, config types, response behavior
